programmes.show_description: Jack and May have problems with their teenage daughter, and it's dance night and Ethel is excited about hoping to find love at last. S1 E9: Sleeping Around
Gary and Phoebe's nightclub falls foul to a protection racket. Ron is heartbroken after being dumped by Flic, and Yvonne receives a rude surprise. S6 E8: Something Fishie

Drama series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. The murder of a football fan results in a clash of methods as Sam and Gene go undercover in a local pub. Starring John Simm. S1 E5
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
When Brenda asks Malcolm to meet her in the Grapes, Pamela arrives and meets Malcolm before he takes Brenda for an Indian meal. S1 E2: Wrestling
Dorien is treating Sharon and Tracey to a Christmas trip to the Canary Islands; with an overdramatic passenger also on board, the plane does not reach its destination. S11 E1: Birds on a Plane
Mr. Bean buys a TV and a new camera but has issues with both; meanwhile, he ends up in another pickle when he goes to a magic show and a disco. E4: Mr. Bean Goes to Town
Amy's suspicions are further aroused by David and Linda's midnight swim, and Robert also suspects that a romance is in the air. S1 E5: Bedroom Farce

With growing competition, the factory faces closure, leaving Eli and Nellie penniless, starving, and with no staff. S3 E6: Two Pennies To Rub Together
David refuses to go with Amy to visit the ruins by saying that he already booked a court to play tennis with Linda; Robert still does not suspect, but Amy finally sees the evidence. S1 E6: Forty Love
Poppy arranges a secret assignation with James, and a fancy dress party is planned to celebrate Cissy's birthday which brings a few surprises. S1 E3 Love or Money
Rigsby becomes convinced that magic is real after Philip bangs a ritual spear on the floor - while Ruth tries to offer herself to Rigsby, Philip and Alan play a trick on him. S1 E2: Black Magic
When an old school friend - now a successful American record producer - drops back into town, Wolfie begins to see himself as a rockstar in the making. S2 E6: Rock Bottom
Adrian undergoes a character change, Mr and Mrs Boswell have an unforgettable lunch, and Jack suffers a crisis of conscience. S3 E3
Sandra enjoys a passionate week with Rex while her mums in hospital, but normality soon returns. Beryl hears from runaway Gwyn, and Mrs Hennessey seeks divine lottery tips. S10 E6: Out of Hospital
The Minister for Transport is on his way to visit the station, but disaster awaits as there is no milk left at the train's buffet for his cup of tea! S2 E1: No Milk For The Minister
Poppy arranges a secret assignation with James, and a fancy dress party is planned to celebrate Cissy's birthday which brings a few surprises. S1 E3 Love or Money
George has been claiming for a non-existent son for the past 19 years in order to fiddle his tax returns, but he is in danger of being caught when a tax inspector visits. S4 E6: My Son, My Son
Mr. Brown is offered a better job at a rival English school if he quits and starts the next day. When the new job falls through, he has to figure out how to get his old one back. S3 E4: Just the Job
An unexpected visit coincides with Andy and Fergie's Royal Wedding. Alf Garnett has rivals for his affections. In Sickness and In Health S2 E6

Ray quickly steps into his shifty uncle's shoes when Arthur allows himself to be persuaded into retirement.

When Gary discovers his photo in a biography of Noel Coward, he heads back in time to try and erase it from existence before Yvonne gets a chance to see it. S6 E9: Flash Bang Wallop
More mayhem with hapless bumbler Mr. Bean as he struggles to wait in line for an appointment and thinks up some unusual methods to help him sleep. E13: Goodnight Mr. Bean
A hostage situation becomes personal for Sam when the hostage-taker's deadline coincides with the deadline for switching off his life-support machine in 2006. Starring John Simm. S1 E6
It's Beryl's sister's wedding, but Dad is seeing another woman, Gloria doesn't want to get married, and Mum is putting on a brave face - time for Beryl and Sandra to help! S2 E1: The Wedding

Where Malcolm takes Brenda to Chester, she plays second fiddle to a piece of furniture that he is returning for his mother. S1 E3: Outing
Dorien gets the idea that Sharon could be the heroine for her next book, and Tracey's got her hands full with a despondent Garth. S11 E2: There's Something About Sharon
Mr. Bean gets to an appointment with the dentist after oversleeping and has trouble in the park with a bothersome fly. E5: The Trouble with Mr. Bean

It is Boxing Day in the Pledge house, Bored Lily and Walter join Nellie and Eli in a seance. S3 E7: The Ghost of Picklers Past
With their affair now exposed, Linda and David plan to run off together - Robert wants to fight David, but Amy decides to foil their plan. S1 E7: Hasta La Vista
Lady Lavender has decided where her shares are going, and Ivy is in trouble for what she saw at the fancy dress party the night before. S1 E4 Fair Shares
Rigsby is dressed to kill as he takes Miss Jones out to dinner to celebrate her birthday. S1 E3: A Night Out
Feeling the stress of eviction and his dead-end place in the world after Shirley moves to Italy, Wolfie climbs up on the pub roof and threatens suicide. S3 E1: Don't Look Down
Lilo Lill turns up on the doorstep, Joey meets Roxy, Adrian buys something really stupid and Aveline is insulted by a photographer. S3 E4
Reunited at last, Beryl and Sandra clash over their mothers when Beryl shatters Sandra's Rex-fuelled fantasy. Hurt and angry, Beryl moves out, threatening their fragile friendship. S10 E7: Moving Out
Jack is convinced that something is going on between May and Cecil - and with good reason as they knew each other 18 years earlier and May happens to have an 18-year-old daughter. S2 E2: Father's Day
Lady Lavender has decided where her shares are going, and Ivy is in trouble for what she saw at the fancy dress party the night before. S1 E4 Fair Shares
It is Chrissy's birthday when she receives a cine camera and projector from her boyfriend Neil, but Larry plans to use it to watch blue movies. S5 E1: The Last Picture Show
All the students find themselves up court for causing breaches of the peace or riots. Flashbacks show how these came about. S3 E5: Guilty or Not Guilty
As Christmas approaches Alf Garnett's problems increase - but things are eventually resolved by Caribbean magic. In Sickness and in Health Christmas Special 1986
